programmes.show_description: Documentary-style drama with Danny Dyer. Hard-drinking Tommy Johnson uses his love of football as an excuse for indulging in violence, but conflicts quickly spiral out of control.
Classic horror starring Christopher Lee and Peter Cushing. When a mysterious frozen creature awakens on the Trans-Siberian Express, two men must fight to contain its awful power.
Horror Channel returns soon.

A man makes the mistake of adding his lover to the deed on his house; she claims he threatened to kill her.
An Uber driver claims a mother/daughter duo took a pick axe to her car; the daughter says she was sucker-punched by the driver.
A woman gets a deal on a paint job then sues the contractor for an allegedly shoddy job, mental anguish and legal fees.
A motorist is accused of tracking down a biker that annoyed him and tackling him into a moving car.
A mum stays at home to care for five children all under the age of four; a heated dispute between her husband and his mum makes matters worse.
When a Slovakian woman's Visa application is denied, she sues small business owners for allegedly scamming her with a thousand-dollar application process.
A short-lived romance ends with a woman receiving a $2,900 car from her lover the same month she breaks up with him.
When an electricity bill reaches the thousands, an engaged gay couple take a family member to court; the foreclosed home goes up in smoke.
A property on the border of Mexico is at the heart of a tenant/landlord dispute in which marijuana, vandalism and water rights come into play.

Lost Innocence: This is a gripping series exploring notorious murder cases that transformed idyllic UK rural landscapes into crime scenes.
In this gripping episode, we explore the tragic story of Sarah Williams, whose obsession with former fireman Ian Johnston leads to the murder of his new partner, Sadie Hartley.
Nicki Myers Bates was just seven years old in 2006 when her mother vanished and the man her mum lived with told police he watched her die.
A respected physician is murdered and investigators must use the knowledge of cell phone mapping and wiretapping to catch the killer.
The family of a dead man claimed he had gone out walking alone and never returned.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. Drug gangs recruit middle-schoolers, resulting in a turf war that puts students in danger.
Action thriller sequel with Jason Statham. Hitman Arthur Bishop is blackmailed into committing three assassinations when his arch-enemy Crain kidnaps his girlfriend.
Thriller with Michael Douglas. While trying to expose a neo-Nazi who infiltrated the White House, a Secret Service agent is framed for murder and his protege is told to bring him to justice.
Action with Jean-Claude Van Damme. An ex-soldier supports the family of his murdered brother by participating in underground street fights - but one fight proves tougher than the rest.
Thriller inspired by true events with Arnold Schwarzenegger. The lives of two strangers become inextricably bound together after a devastating plane crash.

An ex-convict claims that while he served time his girlfriend stole from his bank account; she claims the money was spent on him.
An altercation on St. Patrick's Day leads to a man allegedly spitting on a woman's car window; Judge Judy tracks down his accomplices.
A dog sitter makes an ill-fated decision to visit a locale with an allegedly dangerous large dog; a bruised spine and over 7k in vet bills soon follow.
A man claims he was bleeding profusely after an alleged attack by a pit bull whose owner claims it would never hurt anyone.
A man openly admits he doesn't pay taxes and sues a former friend for the return of property and for allegedly filing a false police report.
A wild party leaves a vacation rental in shambles after an intended group of 8 turns into a 'caught on video' gang of 30 partygoers.
Even though puppies look exactly like their dog, a mother and son deny that their pet was responsible and sue neighbours for an alleged attack.
Judge Judy advises a father to appeal any grievances against previous judges, as he takes on the mother of his teenager over child support.
Only two days after buying a used car, the new owner says the brake pads fell off when he put it in reverse; he is sued for the unpaid balance.

The Cold Case: This gripping series explores notorious murder cases that transformed idyllic UK rural landscapes into crime scenes. Each episode reveals the chilling stories behind the tragedies.
In this chilling episode, Michael O'Leary is murdered by his best friend Andrew Jones after an affair with Andrew's wife. Lured to Andrew's farm under false pretences, Michael is executed.
In November of 2016, Dr. Eric Scott Sills called 911 and reported finding his wife and business partner unresponsive at the bottom of the stairs.
When a man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was possible, until Police looked into his girlfriend's behaviour leading up to his death.
After Cally Jo Larson was found dead in her home, an investigation produced no suspects, until burglaries several months after the murder led police to the evidence they needed.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Walker investigates a mystery illness sweeping across the children on a Cherokee reservation from polluted water.
Fact-based gangster drama with Al Pacino. An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying more with the mafia life - at the expense of his regular one.
Action thriller with Wesley Snipes. A federal marshal hellbent on justice and revenge teams up with a skydiver to capture a convict who escaped from custody after killing his brother.
